text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still gasping for breath after a song,<n>Smart Falcon
calls out to the crowd.<n>The response is lukewarm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not one to be discouraged, she<n>encourages the
crowd to sing with<n>her and begins another
number.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, a few students start to<n>hum along. The
sheer passion<n>emanating from the stage draws
eyes. Slowly but surely, I feel<n>something changing
in the air.
